releaseNotes: Nollywood (Nigerian Films) tab fully wired: EmptyStateView icon + text, TMDB Nigerian film discovery, curated 20-film Nollywood seed list, multi-stream playback via server proxy
Football streaming via live sports aggregators: streamed.su, crackstreams.biz, sportshub.stream — WebView intercepts .m3u8 streams using the same pipeline as movies and anime
EmptyStateView now shows proper icon (Flag) and text (No Nollywood films loaded yet) for the NIGERIAN_FILMS tab
TMDB multi-search (pages 1-3) + trend fallback ensures movies, shows, and Nigerian films return results for any search query
Build fix: coroutineScope context added to searchVideo parallel page fetches, MediaResult type conversion resolved for multi-search pipeline
